confirm.title: PC Agent found
confirm.description: Add **{name}** at {host}? Make sure Home Assistant is connected in the PC Agent app (Integrations → Connect).

user.title: Add PC Agent (manual)
user.description: Enter the LAN IP of the PC running PC Agent. The app must be running with Home Assistant connected.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach PC Agent — check the IP and that the app is running on the LAN

abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the discovered PC Agent
